PD  MOTION TO ADD TO  CALL FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION FILED
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/CCC:CASES 20006564 & 20008105/MTR-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ: 10 DAYS/ADDL CTS:3/PROB EXT: 09-15-23/4019HALF/

/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT//X:THE DEFENDANT THROUGH THE DEFENSEATTORNEY STIPULATES TO THE RESTITUTION OWED TO THE VICTIM MAYA PETERSON-BAILY IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,157,00/CCU/X:CR-110'S & 111'S ARE SIGNED, FILED &SERVED IN OPEN COURT/

/CAL:SENTENCE/AJW/CH2:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 10D/CTS:10/DNA/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/RESTR/WS/WEAP/X:ABIDEBY THE PREVIOUS STAY AWAY ORDER THAT WAS FILED/X:COLLECTION OF FINES ANDFEES ARE SUSPENDED/DISM/

/CAL:DISPOSITION/X: THE COURT GRANTS THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S ORAL MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASE NUMBER 20006564 AND 20008105,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:004/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/ARBUCKLE/PRES:08-20-20/PPRF/ACM/X:THE DEFENDANT SHALL STAY OFF OF THE 900 BLOCK OF BRANNAN ST,, S,F, CA/SAORD/CONTD:PSR AND SENTENCE/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:09-02-20 (30TH)/LDPX:09-21-20 (60TH)/987,2/BAIL:25,000/CONTD:DISPO/DOP/
/CAL:APD MTR FILING/FTA/PROB ADM REV/BWI/NB/BWNUM:1ST/X: 2 OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
